description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and gabled roof combination, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped garden. The front features a large driveway with a covered carport, a manicured lawn, and ornamental trees. The rear of the house includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating area, and a cylindrical water tank. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The exterior is finished in white and gray tones, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The property is enclosed by a white perimeter wall, offering privacy and a sense of enclosure.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat and gabled roof, large windows, a carport, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a white boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, manicured lawn, and ornamental trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, backyard patio, swimming pool, and cylindrical water tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio area, and large sliding glass doors.
description_view_3: Back view showing the gabled roof, upper-story windows, and the enclosed garden with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door adjacent to the carport
